visual_checks: Examine the filename of the document to determine if it is meaningful and descriptive
Check whether the filename gives a user a reasonable indication of the document content before opening it
Look for patterns indicating auto-generated or scan-produced filenames such as random characters, hashes, or date-only strings
pass_conditions: The filename is meaningful and gives an indication of the document's content or purpose
The filename uses recognizable words or abbreviations that relate to the document topic
The filename is reasonably concise while still being descriptive
fail_conditions: The filename is a random hash or auto-generated string (e.g., 'a3f8b2c1d4e5.pdf', '8f14e45f-ceea.docx')
The filename is a generic placeholder (e.g., 'doc1.pdf', 'Document1.docx', 'file.pdf', 'New Document.pdf')
The filename is a scanner-generated string with only a date or scan reference (e.g., 'scan_20240101.pdf', 'IMG_20240315.pdf')
The filename is entirely numeric with no descriptive text (e.g., '20240101123045.pdf')
The filename consists of only a single non-descriptive character or abbreviation (e.g., 'x.pdf', 'temp.docx')
na_conditions: The filename cannot be determined from the available information
The content is delivered inline rather than as a downloadable file
ne_conditions: The filename was not provided or could not be extracted from the document metadata
common_mistakes: Uploading scanned documents with the scanner's auto-generated filename intact
Using version control suffixes as the only descriptive element (e.g., 'final_v3.pdf' with no topic)
Saving documents with the default application filename (e.g., 'Document1.docx', 'Presentation1.pptx')
Using internal codes or abbreviations that are meaningless to external users
Relying on folder structure for context while the filename itself is not descriptive

examples.pass: A document about parking regulations is named 'City-Parking-Regulations-2025.pdf' which clearly describes its content
examples.fail: A budget report is named 'scan_20240101.pdf' giving no indication of the document's content
examples.partial: A document is named 'budget.pdf' which hints at the topic but lacks specificity about which budget, for what period, or which organization
